BaseFileLoaderT Methods

One Identity Manager API Server

The BaseFileLoaderT generic type exposes the following members.

Methods
  NameDescription
GetFiles
Returns all file names, mapped to the directory in which they are first found.
TryLoadAsync
Search the file within WorkingDirectory and all ProbeRelativeDirectories sub directories and load as T if found.
